resources.string: Defend a royal crossroads with towers, barracks, hero commands, and spells.

Stage 1 uses a real road network. Enemies enter from the forest and east road, merge at the market, split around the hill, and rejoin near the bastion. Tap build pads to place the selected tower. Tap a tower to upgrade it. Use Hero then tap a road node to move the knight. Guard summons temporary blockers. Meteor hits clustered enemies at merge points. Bats ignore barracks, shamans heal, and rams punish weak gates.
